info.title: Nexus Academy API
info.description: Comprehensive OpenAPI 3.0 documentation for the Nexus Academy backend. This API handles user authentication, course management, enrollments, lessons, reviews, certificates, and instructor earnings. Authentication is handled via JWT tokens stored in cookies.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Endpoints for user registration, login, and session management.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user profiles and administrative user actions.

tags.name: Courses
tags.description: Endpoints for course discovery, creation, and detailed management.

tags.name: Sections
tags.description: Endpoints for organizing courses into structural sections.

tags.name: Lessons
tags.description: Endpoints for managing individual lessons and tracking student progress.

tags.name: Enrollments
tags.description: Endpoints for handling course purchases and student enrollment lists.

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Endpoints for student feedback and course ratings.

tags.name: Certificates
tags.description: Endpoints for issuing, viewing, and verifying course completion certificates.

tags.name: Earnings
tags.description: Endpoints for instructors to track their financial performance.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Endpoints for handling file uploads (images/videos) and secure streaming.

cookieAuth.name: token
cookieAuth.description: JWT token stored in a secure, httpOnly cookie named 'token'.

message.example: A detailed error message describing what went wrong.

bio.example: I love building scalable web applications.

description.example: Learn the basics of ML with Python.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - JWT token is missing or invalid
